efficient_assembly.description: +15% Create mechanical output. Machines work harder for you.

power_engineer.title: Power Engineer
power_engineer.description: +20% stress unit efficiency. Rotational power goes further.

circuit_master.description: +15% redstone signal range. Your circuits reach further.

machine_whisperer.description: +15% machine processing speed. Machines sing for you.

automation_expert.title: Automation Expert
automation_expert.description: +50% auto-crafting interaction range. Control from afar.

alloy_master.title: Alloy Master
alloy_master.description: +20% alloy output. Your metallurgy produces superior results.

mind_of_the_forge.title: Mind of the Forge
mind_of_the_forge.description: All engineering stats +10%. The forge bends to your will.
